<!-- Auto-generated by codebase-harness -->

# Root Files Freshness

## Rule

`AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and `GEMINI.md` are thin wrappers. Their shared content MUST reference `.ai/harness/AGENTS.md`. Edit centralized first, then update wrappers.

## NEVER

- Edit wrapper root files for shared content — edit `.ai/harness/AGENTS.md` instead
- Let root files diverge from the centralized shared instructions
- Add agent-agnostic content to `CLAUDE.md` or `GEMINI.md` — put it in `.ai/harness/AGENTS.md`

## Triggers for Update

- New on-call workflow added to the log
- Log directory structure changes
- New agent-specific capability discovered (add to the relevant root file only)

## Single Source Contract

`.ai/harness/AGENTS.md` is edited → regenerate wrappers.
